title: AI startups raise big
dek: Slack, SambaNova, Norm, and Anthropic make headlines
meta_description: AI startups raise billions, Slack integrates with Salesforce
body_html:
Today's biggest development in the startup world is the integration of Slack with Salesforce, a move that has been five years in the making. According to VentureBeat, Slack's Slackbot can now pull CRM data, generate charts, and send DocuSigns, all from a chat message. This integration is a significant step forward for the two companies, which have been working together since Salesforce acquired Slack for $27.7 billion. As reported by VentureBeat, the mechanism behind this expansion is a set of dedicated Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

This development is crucial for businesses that rely on both Slack and Salesforce, as it streamlines their workflow and reduces the need for manual data entry. With this integration, users can access a wide range of Salesforce features, including CRM data, Tableau analytics, and Data 360 customer profiles, all through a single conversational prompt. As noted by VentureBeat, this is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual updates and migrations.

Slack and Salesforce Integration

The integration of Slack and Salesforce is a significant development in the world of enterprise software. As reported by VentureBeat, this integration allows users to access a wide range of Salesforce features, including CRM data, Tableau analytics, and Data 360 customer profiles, all through a single conversational prompt. This is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual updates and migrations. According to VentureBeat, the mechanism behind this expansion is a set of dedicated Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

This integration is also a significant step forward for the use of AI in enterprise software. As noted by VentureBeat, the integration of Slack and Salesforce allows for the use of AI-powered chatbots to streamline workflow and reduce the need for manual data entry. This is a significant development in the world of enterprise software, as it allows businesses to automate many of their tasks and focus on more strategic initiatives. According to VentureBeat, this integration is a key part of Salesforce's strategy to become a leader in the world of cloud computing.

The integration of Slack and Salesforce is also a significant development in the world of customer relationship management. As reported by VentureBeat, the integration allows users to access a wide range of customer data, including sales history, customer interactions, and customer preferences. This allows businesses to gain a more complete understanding of their customers and provide more personalized service. According to VentureBeat, this is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual data entry and were prone to errors.

In addition to the integration of Slack and Salesforce, there have been several other significant developments in the world of AI and enterprise software. As reported by VentureBeat, digital-native startups are ditching rigid databases for their agentic stacks. This is a significant development, as it allows businesses to move away from traditional relational databases and towards more flexible and scalable solutions. According to VentureBeat, this is a key part of the move towards more agile and flexible software development methodologies.

Digital-Native Startups and Agentic Stacks

The move towards more agile and flexible software development methodologies is a significant trend in the world of enterprise software. As reported by VentureBeat, digital-native startups are ditching rigid databases for their agentic stacks. This is a significant development, as it allows businesses to move away from traditional relational databases and towards more flexible and scalable solutions. According to VentureBeat, this is a key part of the move towards more AI-powered and automated software development methodologies.

The use of agentic stacks is a significant development in the world of enterprise software. As noted by VentureBeat, agentic stacks allow businesses to move away from traditional relational databases and towards more flexible and scalable solutions. This is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual data entry and were prone to errors. According to VentureBeat, the use of agentic stacks is a key part of the move towards more AI-powered and automated software development methodologies.

In addition to the move towards more agile and flexible software development methodologies, there have been several other significant developments in the world of AI and enterprise software. As reported by Startups | TechCrunch, AI chip maker SambaNova has raised $1B at an $11B valuation, just five months after its last mega round. This is a significant development, as it shows the continued growth and investment in the world of AI and machine learning. According to Startups | TechCrunch, this investment will be used to further develop SambaNova's AI and machine learning capabilities.

This is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual data entry and were prone to errors.

In addition to the investment in SambaNova, there have been several other significant developments in the world of AI and enterprise software. As reported by Startups | TechCrunch, AI law startup Norm has raised $120M, hitting a unicorn valuation. This is a significant development, as it shows the continued growth and investment in the world of AI and machine learning. According to Startups | TechCrunch, this investment will be used to further develop Norm's AI and machine learning capabilities.

In addition to the investment in Norm, there have been several other significant developments in the world of AI and enterprise software. As reported by VentureBeat, Anthropic has brought Claude Cowork to mobile and web, expanding a tool that has quietly become the company's bridge between the developer-centric world of AI coding agents and the far larger market of knowledge workers who never open a terminal. This is a significant development, as it shows the continued growth and investment in the world of AI and machine learning.

According to VentureBeat, Claude Cowork is being used to develop more agile and flexible knowledge work services. This is a significant improvement over traditional methods, which often required manual data entry and were prone to errors.

The bottom line

The developments in the world of AI and enterprise software are significant and far-reaching. As reported by VentureBeat, Startups | TechCrunch, and other sources, the integration of Slack and Salesforce, the move towards more agile and flexible software development methodologies, the investment in SambaNova, the investment in Norm, and the expansion of Claude Cowork to mobile and web are all key parts of this trend. According to these sources, these developments are being driven by the continued growth and investment in the world of AI and machine learning.

  • The integration of Slack and Salesforce is a significant development in the world of enterprise software, as it allows businesses to streamline their workflow and reduce the need for manual data entry.
  • The move towards more agile and flexible software development methodologies is a significant trend in the world of enterprise software, as it allows businesses to develop more AI-powered and automated software development methodologies.
  • The investment in SambaNova, Norm, and other AI and machine learning startups is a significant development in the world of AI and machine learning, as it shows the continued growth and investment in this field.
  • The expansion of Claude Cowork to mobile and web is a significant development in the world of AI and machine learning, as it allows knowledge workers to develop more agile and flexible knowledge work services.
